name: Quick Marinara Sauce
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp EDEN Extra Virgin Olive Oil
recipeInstructions:
(Green or black olives can be substituted if
necessary, but won't be as good)
Heat the oil. Saute onions and garlic until translucent.
Add spaghetti sauce. Bring to a simmer. Add capers and
olives and heat for a few minutes more. Serve with any
EDEN Pasta. A great meal with a salad and your favorite bread!
Prep Time: 5 minutes
Cooking Time: 10 minutes
Yield: 5 servings
